title: Petface Foodie Faces Cucumber Latex Dog Toy, Durable Fetch Toy, Large (Pack of 1)
features: SMILEY FACE DESIGN: Keep your furry friend entertained and delighted with this Petface Foodie Faces Cucumber Latex Dog Toy
DURABLE AND STRONG: Made to withstand chewing, fetching and playing ensuring it lasts through many interactive sessions
BUILT-IN SQUEAKER: Make playtime extra exciting with the built-in squeaker that will keep your dog entertained for hours on end
LARGE SIZE: Perfectly sized for larger breeds or dogs who love to play with bigger toys, making it ideal for throw and fetch games

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding accessories, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cat and wild birds for great affordable products! Petface Foodie Faces Fruity Dog Chew Toys The Petface Foodie Faces Latex Dog Chew Toy Fruit Range features fun Kiwi, Watermelon, Raspberry, and Lemon designs in small and large sizes . Made from durable latex with a built-in squeaker , these vibrant toys keep dogs entertained while promoting healthy chewing. Perfect for playtime and fetch! Squeaky, Chewy, Fruity Fun These lightweight, durable latex toys bring a burst of fun with their adorable designs and built-in squeakers! A Splash of Squeaky Goodness! Made from durable latex, these lightweight and squeaky fruit toys are perfect for interactive play and happy pups! Fruit That’s Made to Be Chewed!
